subject: Nosepass, the compass-nose rock-type Pokemon species — a squat, gray, golem-like creature with a large red magnetic nose, standing on rocky terrain
description: A forward-facing, squat gray creature occupies the center of the frame against a pale rocky background. Its most prominent feature is a large, rounded red nose — visually the anchor of the composition. The body is blocky and wide, with stubby arms and a dark oval face with small circular eyes. The terrain beneath it is gray stone. The overall color palette is cool and muted: stone gray, dark charcoal, and the red nose as the sole warm accent. The pose is static and planted, conveying a sense of immovable solidity.
foreground: Nosepass standing on gray rocky ground
emotion: neutral, impassive — wide stance suggests stillness and solidity
